notable_visual_elements: Full intentional blur — no sharp focus anywhere in image
Blur technique signals upcoming reveal (pre-event teaser standard)

cultural_notes.free_notes: Pre-event blur teaser is a well-established Instagram brand tactic — reveal the space but obscure the details to drive curiosity. The fact that the brand space is entirely green (brand color) even in blur shows the immersive physical design. This is the teaser post that precedes DCWLcJjIsyR (the clear reveal post). Sequenced together: blur → clear reveal = effective content arc.

pattern_matches.notes: Intentionally blurred reveal — classic pre-event teaser technique to build anticipation
Teaser is the pre-communication for the Red Sea Mall activation (see DCWLcJjIsyR)
